sourceNoteIntro: This Pulse uses CRMLS / InfoSparks data for Industry, with the article read and chart defaulting to the Residential / Single family live MLS slice sourced from 7/5/2026. The broader Residential export is also available from 7/2/2026. It also uses official city, school, federal, state, and consumer sources for local due-diligence context. Use this as orientation, not a property valuation, legal opinion, lending quote, insurance opinion, school assignment, or forecast.

notes: Housing Market Pulse generated from structured manifest. Keyword intent angle: thin sample pricing confidence. Primary keyword: Industry housing market update. Google Keyword Planner seed queries: Industry housing market; Industry real estate market update; Industry home prices July 2026; should I sell my house in Industry; Industry home selling market; Industry homes for sale inventory; Industry days on market; Industry listing price; Industry seller market; Industry housing market 2026; Industry market update sellers; Industry median home price; are home prices dropping in Industry; is now a good time to sell in Industry. Research packet records editorial context. Visible avatar labels are prohibited and were not used in public page headings, badges, or category labels. Market metrics reviewed: medianSalePrice, averageSalePrice, averagePpsf, medianOriginalPrice, newListings, activeInventory, pendingSales, closedSales, monthsSupply, medianDaysOnMarket, averageDaysOnMarket. Missing/no-data metrics: closedVolume, totalClosedSides, medianLastListPrice, averageLastListPrice, medianShowsToContract, averageShowsToContract, showsPerListing.
